form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth after being driven well back, behind Balladoro at this track over 1800m in a NR up to 49 on March 28 at $17. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Whata Optimist at this track over 2230m in a NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $4.50. Draws well so may be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Port Pirie (1:55.80) beating Magic Captain in 6 LIFETIME WINS on March 31 at $3 at the bell was leading 1.6. Hard to leave out on current form. Winning form deserves some respect.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 2nd (Fr4) over 2160m at Victor Harbor beaten 8 m by Signature Look (2:42.80) in NR 50 to 57 on April 5 at $18.40. Two runs back was well back before the turn; won by 1.1 m as favourite (Sr3) at Gawler (2:33.30) beating Emrites in NR 41 to 46 on March 30 at $2.30 at the bell was 7th-12.4. Rough exotic hope.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr5) over 2230m after being wide early at this track, at the bell was 3rd-2.8 beaten 19 m by Whata Optimist (2:45.10) in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $18.90. Before that 8th (Fr1) over 1800m at this track, beaten 16 m by Letsstartinheaven (2:10.80) in NR 50 to 59 on March 28 at $101. Cannot enthuse on what we have seen of late.

form.formComment: Has won all four starts. Won by 8 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Victor Harbor (2:42.80) beating Linxx in NR 50 to 57 on April 5 at $1.04. Two runs back posted a big 18 m win as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:12.30) beating Stay Angry in 2 LIFETIME WINS on March 28 at $1.04. Highly promising and can maintain the unbeaten record.
